rationale: No new qualitative change affecting Romania this cycle — Black Sea security situation unchanged, Iran deal stalemate continues with mild energy price implications.

top_events.title: Ukraine and Russia exchange cross-border attacks, three killed
top_events.summary: Ongoing war near Romania's border continues at routine intensity; no new escalation affecting Black Sea security or Romanian territory directly.

top_events.title: Tehran says 'nothing' finalised after Trump claims Iran deal near
top_events.summary: Continued Iran deal stalemate sustains mild uncertainty over energy prices, with indirect cost-of-living implications for Romanian households.

top_events.title: China arrests US researcher on espionage charges
top_events.summary: US-China tensions rising slightly; could affect global trade flows and EU economic environment, but impact on Romania remains indirect and limited.
